mapper.sql: hotel_id, hotel_name, province, city, district, address, phone, price_min, price_max, rating, has_wifi, has_breakfast, has_parking, cancel_policy, free_cancel, description, picture, status, is_delete, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM hotel WHERE hotel_id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0
SELECT FROM hotel WHERE hotel_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{hotelName}, '%') AND is_delete = 0
SELECT FROM hotel WHERE city = #{city} AND is_delete = 0
SELECT FROM hotel WHERE price_min > #{minPrice} AND price_max < #{maxPrice} AND is_delete = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hotel (hotel_name, province, city, district, address, phone, price_min, price_max, rating, has_wifi, has_breakfast, has_parking, cancel_policy, free_cancel, description, picture, status, is_delete, create_time) VALUES (#{hotelName}, #{province}, #{city}, #{district}, #{address}, #{phone}, #{priceMin}, #{priceMax}, #{rating}, #{hasWifi}, #{hasBreakfast}, #{hasParking}, #{cancelPolicy}, #{freeCancel}, #{description}, #{picture}, #{status}, #{isDelete}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE hotel SET hotel_name = #{hotelName}, province = #{province}, city = #{city}, district = #{district}, address = #{address}, phone = #{phone}, price_min = #{priceMin}, price_max = #{priceMax}, rating = #{rating}, has_wifi = #{hasWifi}, has_breakfast = #{hasBreakfast}, has_parking = #{hasParking}, cancel_policy = #{cancelPolicy}, free_cancel = #{freeCancel}, description = #{description}, picture = #{picture}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE hotel_id = #{hotelId} AND is_delete = 0
mapper.delete: UPDATE hotel SET is_delete = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE hotel_id = #{hotelId}
